summary: Iteration 228: Tested 4 new features - Admin Sales Ratings page, Leaderboard privacy (no revenue), Balanced scoring (score + label), Dashboard improvements (negative rating highlighting, remind later button). All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all components.

tests: GET /api/admin/discount-analytics/sales-ratings returns KPIs (avg_team_rating, total_ratings, highest_rep, lowest_rep)
GET /api/admin/discount-analytics/sales-ratings returns reps_table, low_alerts, trend, recent_feedback arrays
Admin Sales Ratings page loads at /admin/sales-ratings with all components
Sales Ratings visible in sidebar under Reports & Analytics
GET /api/staff/sales-dashboard leaderboard does NOT contain 'revenue' field
Revenue is used internally for scoring but hidden from sales view
Leaderboard sorted by balanced score descending
Performance labels: Top Performer (>=75), Strong (>=50), Improving (>=25), Needs Attention (<25)
Sales dashboard highlights negative ratings (≤2 stars) with red color and LOW badge
Customer order detail page has 'Remind me later' button on rating prompt
Dismissed state hides rating prompt when remind later clicked
dashboard_improvements.notes: LOW badge and red highlighting implemented in RecentRatingsSection. Remind later button only visible for unrated completed orders.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features (Admin Sales Ratings, Leaderboard Privacy, Balanced Scoring, Dashboard Improvements) are working correctly. The order ORD-20260311-2C3D7A has been rated 5/5 by test@konekt.tz. Leaderboard shows Janeth Msuya at #1 with 35 deals and 'Strong' label. Revenue field is hidden from sales leaderboard (hide_revenue=True). Balanced score uses weights: Deals 30%, Commission 30%, Rating 25%, Revenue 15% (internal). LOW badge appears for ratings ≤2 stars. Remind me later button dismisses rating prompt.
